zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Valoines於大約1249年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾沙炳頓時，她的父親Thomas de Valoignes24歲，母親Joan de Ferrers21歲。她於大約1265年與Robert de Grey在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1312年11月12日之前在英國英格蘭奧可福爾，埋葬在英國奧可福爾洛瑟費爾德 格斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan de Valoines于大约1249年出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾沙炳頓时，她的父亲Thomas de Valoignes24岁，母亲Joan de Ferrers21岁。她于大约1265年与Robert de Grey在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1312年11月12日之前在英国英格兰奧可福爾，埋葬在英国奧可福爾洛瑟費爾德 格斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Valoines was born about 1249, in Shabbington, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas de Valoignes, was 24 and her mother, Joan de Ferrers, was 21. She married Robert de Grey about 1265, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died before 12 November 1312, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Valoines est née environ 1249, à Shabbington, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas de Valoignes, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Joan de Ferrers, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Grey environ 1265, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 12 novembre 1312, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan de Valoines um 1249 in Shabbington, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas de Valoignes 24 und ihre Mutter Joan de Ferrers 21. Sie hat um 1265 in England, United Kingdom Robert de Grey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb vor 12. November 1312 in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Valoines è nata il circa 1249 nel Shabbington, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas de Valoignes, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Joan de Ferrers, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Grey circa 1265, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 12 novembre 1312, nel Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan de Valoinesが約1249年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアシャビントンで生まれた時，父Thomas de Valoignesは24歳，母Joan de Ferrersは21歳であった。約1265年にイギリスイギリスでRobert de Greyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1312年11月12日以前にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアで死去し，イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアロスエルフィールド グレイズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Valoines(이)가 대략 1249년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 샤브빙턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Valoignes(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Ferrers(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1265년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Robert de Grey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1312년 11월 12일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르 로더필드 그리스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Valoines nasceu aproximadamente 1249, em Shabbington, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas de Valoignes, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Ferrers, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Grey aproximadamente 1265, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu antes 12 de novembro de 1312, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Valoines родилась около 1249 г. в местности шаббингтон, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas de Valoignes было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de Ferrers, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Grey около 1265 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 12 ноябрь 1312 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности ротирфиелд грис, оксфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan de Valoines nació aproximadamente 1249, en Shabbington, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas de Valoignes, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Joan de Ferrers, tenía 21 años. Murió antes de 12 de noviembre de 1312, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.
